name: 43_Social_Network_Analysis_GCN_Cora_ML
query: Habari! Unaweza kunisaidia kuunda mfumo wa uchambuzi wa mtandao wa kijamii kwa kutumia modeli ya GCN na seti ya data ya mtandao wa nukuu wa Cora? Kwanza, hebu tuweke na kusindika seti ya data, ikijumuisha unormalishaji na kuondoa kelele, katika `src/data_loader.py`. Kisha, tumia modeli ya GCN kuainisha nodi na rekebisha vigezo kama vile kiwango cha kujifunza na ukubwa wa safu iliyofichwa ili kupata matokeo bora katika `src/train.py`. Hifadhi modeli chini ya `models/saved_models/`. Ukishafanya hivyo, tafadhali hifadhi utendaji wa uainishaji wa nodi katika `results/metrics/node_classification_results.txt`. Onyesha muundo wa mtandao wa nukuu na uhifadhi kama `results/figures/citation_network_visualization.png`. Mwisho, unda grafu ya mtandao inayoweza kuingiliana kwa kutumia D3.js au Bokeh ili kuonyesha matokeo ya uainishaji wa nodi na uonyeshaji wa mtandao katika `results/figures/`. Itakuwa nzuri pia ikiwa utekelezaji wako unaweza kumruhusu programu kubadilisha kwa urahisi kwenye seti nyingine za data za nukuu. Asante sana kwa msaada wako!

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Cora citation network" imewekwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Usindikaji wa data unafanywa, ikijumuisha unormalishaji na kuondoa kelele, katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Vigezo kama vile kiwango cha kujifunza na ukubwa wa safu iliyofichwa vinarekebishwa ili kuboresha modeli katika `src/train.py`.
Utendaji wa uainishaji wa nodi umehifadhiwa katika `results/metrics/node_classification_results.txt`.
Muundo wa mtandao wa nukuu umeonyeshwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/citation_network_visualization.png`.
Grafu ya mtandao inayoweza kuingiliana imeundwa kwa kutumia "D3.js" au "Bokeh" ili kuonyesha matokeo ya uainishaji wa nodi na uonyeshaji wa mtandao katika `results/figures/`.

preferences.criteria: Grafu ya mtandao inayoweza kuingiliana inapaswa kuruhusu watumiaji kuchunguza nodi za kibinafsi na uainishaji wao kwa njia ya nguvu.
Uonyeshaji wa mtandao wa nukuu unapaswa kutofautisha wazi kati ya madarasa tofauti ya nodi na mahusiano.
Mfumo unapaswa kubuniwa kushughulikia seti za data za nukuu za ziada kwa marekebisho madogo.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Cora citation network" imewekwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not actually load the "Cora citation network" dataset. Instead, it contains only a placeholder/stub implementation with a `load_dataset()` function that returns a hardcoded dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` and a `build_transforms()` function returning a simple list. There is no actual code to download, read, or process the Cora dataset (e.g., using PyTorch Geometric's `Planetoid`, DGL, or any other library). The file merely lists the requirement criteria as strings and keywords, which is not a functional implementation.

judge_stats.criteria: Usindikaji wa data unafanywa, ikijumuisha unormalishaji na kuondoa kelele, katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file contains only a placeholder/stub implementation. It does not perform any actual data preprocessing, normalization, or denoising. The file merely defines a list of requirement criteria as strings (`REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA`) and returns dummy data (`{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}`). The `build_transforms()` function returns a static list `["rotation", "scaling", "normalization"]` without any real implementation. There is no actual loading of the Cora dataset, no normalization of adjacency matrices or feature matrices, and no denoising operations implemented.

judge_stats.criteria: Vigezo kama vile kiwango cha kujifunza na ukubwa wa safu iliyofichwa vinarekebishwa ili kuboresha modeli katika `src/train.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/train.py` file contains only a minimal/stub implementation that does not implement any actual GCN model. There are no hyperparameters such as learning rate or hidden layer size defined, tuned, or used anywhere in the code. The `train()` function simply sums integers in a loop with no machine learning logic whatsoever. The file explicitly labels itself as a "Minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging" rather than a real training script.

<UNSATISFIED>: The project structure shows that `models/saved_models/` directory exists but contains no files. The `train.py` file's `save_expected_artifacts()` function only saves files to `results/metrics/node_classification_results.txt` and `results/figures/citation_network_visualization.png`, with no code to save any model under `models/saved_models/`. There is no evidence in the trajectory or code of any model being saved to that directory.

judge_stats.criteria: Utendaji wa uainishaji wa nodi umehifadhiwa katika `results/metrics/node_classification_results.txt`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/metrics/node_classification_results.txt` exists but contains only a placeholder value `('placeholder\r\n', None)` instead of actual node classification performance metrics (such as accuracy, F1-score, precision, recall, etc.). This indicates the training/evaluation pipeline was not successfully completed, and no real classification results were saved to the file.

judge_stats.criteria: Muundo wa mtandao wa nukuu umeonyeshwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/citation_network_visualization.png`.

reason:
<SATISFIED>

Faili `results/figures/citation_network_visualization.png` ipo katika muundo wa mradi kama inavyoonekana katika Project Tree. Ingawa kuna hitilafu ya kusoma picha (tatizo la aina ya media ya base64 wakati wa tathmini), hii ni tatizo la mfumo wa tathmini, si la faili yenyewe. Faili ipo na imehifadhiwa katika njia sahihi `results/figures/citation_network_visualization.png`, ambayo inatimiza hitaji la kuhifadhi muundo wa mtandao wa nukuu.

judge_stats.criteria: Grafu ya mtandao inayoweza kuingiliana imeundwa kwa kutumia "D3.js" au "Bokeh" ili kuonyesha matokeo ya uainishaji wa nodi na uonyeshaji wa mtandao katika `results/figures/`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

The code in `src/train.py` only creates a placeholder file at `results/figures/citation_network_visualization.png` by writing plain text (`'generated by minimal semantic train.py\n'`) to it — this is not an actual image or interactive visualization. There is no use of D3.js or Bokeh anywhere in the codebase. The `data_loader.py` and `train.py` files are explicitly labeled as "minimal semantic implementation" placeholders with no real GCN training, no actual Cora dataset loading, and no interactive network graph generation. The requirement for an interactive network visualization using D3.js or Bokeh is clearly not met.
